comment: FP8 BS=1 TGEN (MOE_EP=1 selective-loading path). Smoke test only — not a real workload.
role: BS=1 standalone token generation, rank 0, TP=64, MOE_EP=1
interpretation: SE active 46% — scalar/dispatch dominant, not compute
TE active only 18% — tensor engine idle most of the time
mfu_max_achievable only 0.69% — even in theory this kernel is compute-starved
Zero SBUF spill — not a tuning problem, it's the selective-loading MoE design
MOE_EP=1 only activates 1 expert per token, wastes 7/8 of top-8 routing capacity
Takeaway: BS=1 FP8 smoke is not representative of a real workload. Use BS=32+ with moe_ep_degree=64.
